questions.statement: Saina Nehwal confirmed her retirement from competitive badminton. In which year did she become the first Indian to win a BWF Super Series title by clinching the Indonesia Open?

options: NASA, NOAA, and the European Space Agency /

questions.statement: The Emerging Science &amp; Technology Innovation Conclave (ESTIC) 2025, India&rsquo;s flagship science and innovation conclave, was inaugurated by Prime Minister Narendra Modi on November 3, 2025, at Bharat Mandapam, New Delhi. What is the theme of ESTIC 2025?
options: Viksit Bharat 2047 &ndash; Pioneering Sustainable Innovation, Technological Advancement and Empowerment /
Science for Society: Driving Inclusive Growth /
Building a Future through Science, Technology &amp; Innovation /
